scripts.build: cd framework && CONTENT_DIR=../content pnpm build && cd .. && rm -rf out && cp -r framework/out ./out
scripts.update:content: cd content && git pull origin main && cd .. && git add content && git commit -m 'Bump content'
scripts.update:framework: cd framework && git pull origin main && cd .. && git add framework && git commit -m 'Bump framework'
